reviews.review_text:
EXCEPTIONALLY rude service on exiting the campsite. When we arrived, the lady at the reception was very relaxed and just said we could have the campsite at night. She did not explicitly tell us that if we didn't leave exactly at 10am, another lady would violently knock on our van, tell us they've charged us a $20 late fee on our card and when we said we didn't realise she said "Yes you did, you were told upon arrival". We were NOT told upon arrival because as I said earlier the person at the reception was different and quite relaxed and just said we could stay. If they were going to try to actively ruin our trip for leaving at 10:40, maybe they should train their staff to explicitly tell customers WHAT the time of depature is (not done in our case) and that we will be charged. The only way we would've known is that the detail of deperature is in the fine print on a piece of paper that the receptionist gave us, which is very easy to miss when you have to learn how to camp, use a dumpsite, fill up water, dispose off waste water without any staff assistance and watching tutorials FOR THE FIRST TIME. I don't mind the late fee but I mind being accused of lying. I can accuse you of lying as well because you didn't tell your receptionist to tell us on arrival. This is quite appalling and I hope to the older lady that you can recognise that people are humans and make mistakes. Sorry for not reading the fine print but at least now you've made it abundantly clear that we should never come back, neither recommend it to others! Thank you for your exceptional service.

P.S. Upon reading other reviews, I noticed a lot of other people have had similar experiences with this particular staff member and she generally sends a lengthly reply where she doesn't take accountability. The customer is always wrong I guess. Just giving people a heads up if you're maybe doing this for the first time and don't want to deal with hostility, don't bother!

This caravan park would be in the top 10 that we have ever used. The caravan sites are ample in size for large vans, and amenities are excellent. Certainly a much better option than the big park closer to Port Arthur.
The location of White Beach makes it a good option for exploring the area.
Staff are also very helpful and polite.

The Tasman Peninsulas hidden gem. Denise was a pleasure to deal with and a gracious and kind host. The park is top notch, spotlessly clean and well maintained. Facilities are great and easily accessible. 2 minutes from Nubeena and just 10 minutes from Pt Arthur. Really lovely spot - would have stayed longer if we could have!

Clean and well-maintained bathrooms and facilities.
Easy access to beautiful White Beach.
Quiet and friendly neighbours.
Great location for nearby attractions.
Convenient and beginner-friendly campground.

Only downside: tap water looked yellow and not very clean.
We brought our own drinking water (6 x 1.5L bottles), so it was fine for us.
첫 캠핑카 투어였는데 아름다운 경치와 충분한 편의시설, 늦은 체크인에도 친절한 응대 덕에 편하게 2박하고 갑니다. 너무 좋았어요. 밤하늘은 또 어찌나 환상적이던지!

We recently stayed at an unpowered tent site for 2 nights. The beach was lovely to swim at. The groundsman does a wonderful job of keeping the place tidy.

Some things to note;
*The tent sites 2 - 8 are grassy and large enough for a big tent. Very comfortable grass underfoot. Close access to the beach and jetty. We were on site 6 and enjoyed our spot. I was originally put on a dirty, hard spot and asked to move and she obliged with no issues
* The camp kitchen has a stove, microwave, and random cooking items. Bring your own because it is a bit hit and miss with what is available. Lovely big bench space for multiple people to prepare their dinner. We had 4 families in there cooking one night. The fridges don't seem to be working and could do with replacing.
* The bathrooms are very clean and the showers are free (5 minute timer) and very hot and spacious. Room for your bag and to get changed without getting wet.
* The BBQ's cost money to use.
*The little shop has Toiletries, snacks, drinks, bottled water, bags of ice ($4.50) and ice creams.

My only negative feedback is essentially being overcharged for our site. If it is $40 for TWO adults, it should also be $40 for ONE adult and a child. Two people is two people so I still don't understand why I was charged $48 for one big person and one small person. For that reason alone I have dropped my review by 1 star.

We will return if we visit the area again.

Nice place for a swim calm bay
Clean bathrooms beautiful park

Beautiful location, but disappointing service.

We received a very abrupt SMS about checkout, warning of a fee and telling us to “leave the premises immediately” — even though they knew our car had broken down and we had already said we’d be leaving shortly after 10.

Unpowered campsite area smelt like sewerage. Stink was overpowering and made it unpleasant to be near camp and difficult to sleep. I think this was wafting up and over through the wooden boards next to the RV dump site. Called the night manager to ask if we could move sites and was effectively told that moving wouldn’t help.

Booked for three nights and left after the first. Offered to move sites but we had already booked elsewhere.
Great caravan park with nice facilities, non powered sites have the nicest view

Will not stay here again.
Beautiful park, but extremely poorly managed. After a long day driving, we were aggressively confronted by an older staff member while unloading—so aggressive it scared my grandchildren. We followed the instructions given by reception regarding our vehicles and were still treated with complete disrespect. To make matters worse, one member of our group became unwell after drinking the tap water. Totally unacceptable. If you can’t communicate calmly and respectfully with customers, you shouldn’t be in this business.
Nice beach - one end to another end - 2km

Der Campingplatz ist ruhig und schön am Wasser gelegen, sagt ja schon der Name.|Man kann viel unternehmen und keine lange Fahrzeit.|Was wir nicht gut finden seit wir an der Süd - Ostküste sind, dass Duschzeiten begrenzt sind und das Licht in Sanitäranlagen mit Bewegungsmelder ausgestattet sind. Auch das man nur kalt waschen kann und das für 5 Dollar. |Trotzdem würden wir den Platz zu 100 % weiterempfehlen.
Gorgeous grounds and location. All areas of the park, both inside and out, are kept so clean and tidy. Friendly customer service from all the staff. Stay, you won’t be disappointed.
Clean and tidy, bathrooms are great. Would highly recommend
水很髒，以價錢來說cp值太低了，不會再來了
Staff were polite and efficient. I stayed on a powered site.  Great place, well kept and lots of camp sites.
Look forward to our next stay

Be prepared to be cancelled at 4pm the day supposed to check in… we did not have an Australian phone number as we are tourist from overseas, they only told us they won’t accept us at 4pm because we couldn’t call them to confirm the booking LOLLLLL… I have suggested other methods such as WhatsApp call, they simply rudely replied: we don’t have WhatsApp, without thinking of any other methods to help us check in.

What I can tell is that Denise is not welcoming at all.

Take the risk if you still want to book this place. What a shame.
Very friendly staff and keen to share their knowledge of the area.We stayed in Unit 21 and it was very clean and spacious. Well equipped pots/pans. Walk down to the beach.

Last minute booking was easy even when checking in after late. Much more expensive than most parks however. Amenities were clean. Shower timer a bit of a nuisance for washing small children and when there is a queue. Washing machine and dryer was going to be $10 in $1 COINS which was a bit ridiculous, therefore the coin machine was empty.

The location is just magical.
The amenities are clean as are the grounds within the entire park. These amenities are at the top of the park, so a bit of a walk to use them.
The mobile home section of the park was in the perfect location, the sites are close together, making for a squeezy environment at times.
We were having difficulty with the water pressure & we were informed of the problem with the water by the receptionist on arrival. 10ltr cask water is available for purchase ($10). Also when my husband did let them know of the water pressure the problem was fixed promptly.
On arrival the receptionist was amazing, so helpful & very informative. We were towing our small Suzuki behind our mobile home & we were informed of their “one vehicle - one code” policy, however the lady allowed us to take our Suzuki to our site to unload our items there. This was wonderful as not only were some items heavy, but the mobile home section was at the far opposite end of the “caravan park’s second car carpark”.
We took our Suzuki straight there after unloading & parked it there when not in use.
Unfortunately the same courtesy was not allowed to us on our vacating the caravan park’s second car. The young female receptionist was very adamant that in no way were we allowed to take our Suzuki into the park, hence my husband & I had to lug our heavy items on several journeys to the car.
Hence the 4 stars.
The location is perfect to visit the many locations nearby & 1.5hrs from Hobart.
Oh & the resident bandicoots were a common sight in the evening!
We stopped here in the motorhome, it was off the cuff after a tour at Port Arthur. Very friendly staff and incredible location

This is a great spot to spend some time on the Peninsula. Right on the beach to watch the sunset and not too far from anything to explore the area. Good sites, all relatively flat, clean bathrooms with good shower pressure and a decent camp kitchen.

The park itself is very nice, however my poor wife was in the shower, when a cleaner (a male) entered the women's showers/toilets and shouted "You have on minute to be out!". This was well out of the posted cleaning times. My wife was covered in shampoo, and became terrified. We complained at the office, we were told we were in the right (no surprise) but that was it. Zero follow up, case closed you could say. NOT GOOD ENOUGH!

When we arrived to check in, the lady at reception was very rude and made us feel very unwelcome. We had to go back 20 minutes later, as we couldn’t get in the boom gate and she growled at us saying “ I don’t have time for this”. If it wasn’t for it being Australia Day long weekend and no availability else where in the area, we would have left. |It is a very family orientated place. So if you want a quiet time, this is not it. Kids were running, yelling and riding their bikes through the camp sites with little parent supervision. |The beach access, was the highlight.
I will be back
Amazing location with good ammenities. Surrounded by bush with access to an amazing beach.

We stayed from 27-29 December and we loved our stay, such a beautiful location! The park is really well looked after and maintained, we seen cleaners everyday cleaning the kitchen, outdoor area and bathrooms etc and you can genuinely tell that the owners really want you to enjoy your stay! The canteen had bags of ice available to buy at the same price we purchased locally in Launceston and they had cheap bait and generally the whole canteen was really affordable and wasn’t over priced which also shows just how much the owners really care about people staying enjoy their time here. Honestly I can’t fault a thing and I  I’ll be recommending this tourist park as a 10/10 place to stay. Thankyou for our inviting stay, hopefully we will be back in the near future and well done on maintaining such a beautiful tourist park :) - Jess

Couples cabin. Very well appointed. Can see the water from the cabin looking out across the park. Good heating. Exceptionally clean.
Recommended
Had a great site down by the beach..managers here were such a friendly couple..nothing was too much trouble..the park was very clean and amenities were great
Booked a powered lot for my campervan. Perfect location. Staff were very accommodating to our needs. Very pleasant stay for our holidays. Thank you very much!!

My family and I love this park and visit regularly, it has great amenities and is nestled in a beautiful spot right next to the beach and highly recommend a visit if you are planning a stay on the picturesque Tasmania peninsula.

Excellent camping ! Nous avons passé 2 nuits parfaites ici, l'accueil fut excellent, les emplacements sont top, les douches et toilettes sont très propres et la salle commune pour manger est parfaites, il y a même le wifi de disponible. De plus vous avez la plage et ses couchers de soleils juste à coté, rien à redire c'était parfait
Gem of a spot, nice and quiet during the winter months. Lovely managers of the park
Lovely place for a quick stop.
Fijne camping met mooie plekken en goede voorzieningen. Gelegen aan het strand. Jammer dat er sleutels nodig zijn voor de gebouwen. Dit maakt het soms vervelend.
Great location. Flat ground. Friendly staff. Would recommend.

Beautiful park beside a picturesque beach especially at sunset. Soft white sand with views around the bay and islands. Loved the wildlife especially the cute bandicoots.  All the amenities and grounds are kept to a very high standard. The park managers are very friendly and have lots of suggestions for things to see and do
Mega Standort. Super Sonnenuntergang gesehen. Alles sauber und fit ausgestattet

Lovely place , nice beach , satisfactory bathroom conditions the staff were iffy not amazing i asked for a refund and was then threatened to be called the cops on and then they tried to tell us we were on “ something “ after spending a night here we were sworn with rats running around everywhere I had planned on 2 nights but after this we decided to go else where . They tried to tell my partner that they were just bandicoots and other wild life but they weren’t and after talking to other camper they expressed their same opinions .
An excellent location only 15 minutes from Port Arthur with a lively beach, boat ramp and Jetti.
Excellent in every way. Caravan sites were great

Stayed 4 nights from Monday 19th Feb 2024.  Site 20.  Great site, nice and large. Was recommended this park by fellow travellers we met.  Beautiful park, exceptionally maintained, grounds and facilities.  Location just the best.  Bev and Peter in reception lovely.  Watched the sunset every evening on the beach.  A real hidden gem.  IGA supermarket close by.  Don’t forget to visit the heritage convict mining trail.  Takes some time to walk around but very worthwhile and it’s free.  Very interesting.  Would definitely stay again.  Laundry facilities good.  There are not many restaurants around.  There is a tavern and bottle shop.

Amazingly nice park. Clean amenities. Large barbecue area. Walking access to the beach. Nice secluded sights for privacy. Service was excellent and they have a small store to buy the essentials. Great stay, recommend it to anyone in the Port Arthur area, as it's affordable and the best stay of out Tasmanian trip.

A hidden gem, fantastic location 30 sec walk to amazing beach…great customer service (Bev & Pete), great clean facilities.
Timed 5 minute showers worked a treat, great pressure and hot hot water.
Good sized sites for Vans, Motor Home and tents.
10/10 and would definitely recommend and would stay again…

Had 2 nights here. Nice clean park.
We have a bid rig, and they have plenty of sites that could fit us.
Amenities were nice and clean. Timer for showers... 5 minutes.
But I found that is plenty of time to run around under the water.
Good playground for the kids and movie night.
Good security.....boom gates...codes in and out.
Beach in front of the park, could hear the waves from bed. Lovely.
$45 pn powered site.
Beautiful caravan park

Absolutely rude individuals that run this place... would never recommend anyone stay there while these people are running it.....
My daughter called in to get something off of us she needed to go to the toilet, the rude lady come out of the office having a go about no visitors she marched in to the toilet and demanded keys back. Human rights are when ya need to go you go.....
Rudest individual I have even encountered....
Not even worth 1 ⭐️

Went camping. Pretty nice facilities, right on the beach, beats just most places I've camped. Perfect place if you have kids.

Didn't personally deal with owner but there was some friction with others in my group.

Came with a camper van. Facilities were fantastic. Bathrooms were cleaned, with a timed 5 minute shower. Kitchen had everything you need, and if you came with a family it is the most perfect spot! There was planned movies and ice cream van for the Saturday night we were there!

A well laid out park.   Excellent, clean facilities.  Great location next to the gorgeous White Beach.   Close to Port Arthur.  Very happy with our choice to stay here in our small non self contained camper.
Nice park just a real pity that the people that run the park are on a full on power trip about the absolute rubish gate/pin code set up. Get rid of it. P.O.S.

Really nice caravan park in a beautiful part of Tassie.  Nice and close to Port Arthur.
The staff were really nice and it was really well priced compared to other caravan/camping spots in the area.
Over all very good experience. Clean and safe. Family friendly and most importantly near to the beach. The Port Arthur site is also near by. Well maintained site.
Excellent place to stay very clean and tidy. Well equipped caravan very close to the beach

Booked a spot for our campervan with a beautiful beach view. Lovely sunsets. Showers and toilets were clean and only a short walk. Easy check in process. We loved going for walks on the beach and even saw a few stingrays in the water.
What a gem of a place owners have extensive knowledge of the area would highly recommend staying there

My partner and i went for a two day stay at White beach park.We enjoyed the stay we could walk to the beach from the park as its situated right next to beach.There are alot of walk trails in the area,wineries and distilleries in the area to visit.The park has all the facilities you need for a comfortable stay, cabins , caravan and camping sites ,camp kitchen and event room plus a pizza oven .You can visit Port Arthur for a day trip from there as well
Exceptionally well situated tourist park with powered sites right on the beach. Fantastic facilities, very well maintained and reasonably priced. Highly recommend.
Awesome service & amenities & awesome views

All I can say is Value for money.. my Hubby and I Always have the Best time here, the Owners Pete & Bev are just the most friendly, helpful & accommodating Peep's you will ever meet. The park is clean, the sites are great,and your central to abso everything the Peninsula has to offer .. if I could give more stars I would..
